Patch Set 2: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-cds-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/459/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-cds-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/459/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-cds-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/459

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> recheck

I don't think the build has been failing due to code change(s) but most likely due to some build infra issue. 

Here is  one of the error messages from the build:
ERROR: Could not build wheels for cryptography which use PEP 517 and cannot be installed directly
19:35:40 Build step 'Execute shell' marked build as failure.

Interestingly, error messages seems to be different for each build failure. Not really sure how to fix it on my end.

thanks,
kuldip singh rai

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-cds-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/474/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.apache.velocity:velocity:jar:2.0 needed for sub-project org.onap.ccsdk.cds.blueprintsprocessor.modules:blueprint-core:jar:1.1.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact.
